programme.title: Quo Vadis TV
programme.desc: Quo Vadis TV is committed to sharing the Biblical message in a way that makes Christian living practical, realistic, and attainable. Our theme is summarized the question: "where are you going?" Our Aim with this inquiry is to help people find orientation and find the path back to God.

Our theme is summarized the question: "where are you going?" Our Aim with this inquiry is to help people find orientation and find the path back to God.

programme.title: Breath of Life
programme.desc: Dr. Carlton Byrd, speaker-director for Breath of Life Ministries, presents the gospel of Jesus Christ to the students.

programme.title: Country Wisdom
programme.desc: There's an old song that goes, I did it my way. Does that fit you? Are you convinced that whatever happens in life-you can deal with it or do you at least try? There is another way that offers fool-proof success.

programme.title: 3ABN Today Bible Q&A
programme.desc: Finding out whether there really are three heavens, and whether fallen angels have varying degrees of wickedness, with Greg Morikone, James Rafferty, Daniel Perrin, and John Lomacang.

programme.title: Thunder in the Holy Land
programme.desc: A documentary-style Bible study from young reporters exploring the teachings of Jesus; Charles Byrd.

programme.title: It Is Written
programme.desc: A spiritual ministry dealing with such issues as health, family values and spiritual principles.

programme.title: Revelation Insights
programme.desc: Modern insights from the book of Revelation.

programme.title: New Perceptions
programme.desc: Messages from Pioneer Memorial Church.

programme.title: Voice of Prophecy Speaks
programme.desc: Lonnie Melashenko.

programme.title: Forecasting Hope
programme.desc: David Klinedinst delivers the Word of God through messages of the Bible that can guide devotees through their daily lives.

programme.title: Behold the Lamb Presents
programme.desc: What is needed to prepare for the kingdom of heaven; hosted by Chris Shelton with uplifting music.

programme.title: In the Footsteps of Paul
programme.desc: The world of the Apostle Paul and how to apply his teachings to today.

programme.title: It Is Written
programme.desc: A spiritual ministry dealing with such issues as health, family values and spiritual principles.

programme.title: Give Me the Bible
programme.desc: Kenneth Cox brings an in-depth look at important truths of the Bible; a variety of religious topics.

programme.title: Revelations: Ancient Discoveries
programme.desc: Sorting out the claims and counterclaims of over 1800 different religious denominations in the U.S.

programme.title: 3ABN Worship Hour
programme.desc: Devotees gather at a church to sing hymns and verses from the Holy Bible to feel connected with the Almighty and seek his blessings.

programme.title: 3ABN Homecoming
programme.desc: A religious leader elaborates on the teachings of Jesus Christ and encourages followers to follow the path of spirituality.

programme.title: Salvation in Symbols and Signs
programme.desc: Hosts James Rafferty and Ivor Myers, along with a panel of experts, examine the themes and symbolism of salvation in the Bible.

programme.title: Timeless Healing Insights
programme.desc: Dr David DeRose shares insights into healing through biblical teachings and encourages viewers to walk the path of spirituality.

programme.title: 3ABN Sabbath School Panel
programme.desc: The book of Joshua confronts us with a challenging reality: God not only allowed but commanded Israel's conquest of Canaan. This week and next, we'll seek a deeper understanding of God's character through the lens of Israel's conquest.

programme.title: The Three Angels Message
programme.desc: Pastor Stephen Bohr examines God's last message on Earth by breaking down each phrase of Revelation 14:6-12.

programme.title: Revelation Now
programme.desc: Review of modern history in connection with the Bible.

programme.title: 3ABN On the Road
programme.desc: Cameras go on the road to exciting events across the country.

programme.title: Life Discovery Series
programme.desc: Live and grow through a fresh understanding of the Scriptures; hosted by Jim Reinking.

programme.title: Dead Meat
programme.desc: Chef Leysath heads to Alabama for swamp bunnies and racoons, but it's as much about the dogs as it is the game they're after; after the hunts, Leysath finds out if they're fit to eat.

programme.title: M2D Camo's Livin' the Dream
programme.desc: Sparky, AKA THE JOKER from Jokers Wild Outdoors, takes friends, family and clients hunting all over the world and on M2D CAMO Properties for wild exciting adventures.

programme.title: Stars and Stripes Adventures
programme.desc: Stars & Stripes Adventures & Purple Heart Homes through outdoor adventures, we aim to foster healing, camaraderie, and empowerment, while also engaging a network of patriots to make meaningful improvements to the homes of our heroes. It is the heart of everything we do, a deep commitment to those who've sacrificed for our country. Our Purpose, Vision, and Mission guides our efforts to ensure every service-connected disabled Veteran has the stability, dignity, and opportunity they deserve.

programme.title: Our Way of Life
programme.desc: Mike and Heather beach seine to catch salmon, which they then prepare in a variety of ways to distribute among their community and family.

programme.title: The Given Right
programme.desc: Hunting is not a privilege, it is our God given right. Hunt always was, and continues to be integrally woven into the fabric of society. It is our goal to celebrate our God given right to hunt in each episode, and portray the passion we all have for this way of life. Follow Kenneth Lancaster, Mark Heck and Laden Force as they travel the country, exercising their God given right to hunt.

programme.title: Jim Shockey's Hunting Adventures
programme.desc: Searching for world record bucks.

programme.title: Gun Stories
programme.desc: The unicorn of WWII German firearms.

programme.desc: Livin' the Dream follows Captain Jimmy Nelson and his wife Luiza as they travel and fish in exotic locales.

programme.title: Realtree's Monster Bucks
programme.desc: Tyler Jordan recounts hunts from Missouri.

programme.title: The Gamekeepers of Mossy Oak
programme.desc: We're joined in-studio by Dr. Blake Grisham of Texas Tech and Courtenay Conring, a dedicated young biologist. These two are leading a long-term research project on Sandhill Cranes.

programme.title: Adventures of Chapo Gringo
programme.desc: Follow our fearless host, Robert Beall, aka 'Chapo Gringo', as he guides you through heart-pounding escapades across the globe in search of thrilling hunts and unparalleled experiences. In each episode, Robert immerses viewers in breathtaking landscapes while sharing his passion for the outdoors. With his charismatic personality and quick wit, Robert ensures non-stop entertainment and laughter throughout.

programme.title: Roger Raglin Outdoors
programme.desc: Roger takes his daughter-in-law on her first hunt celebrating the birth of his 17th grandchild.

programme.title: The Violent Men
programme.desc: (1955) Cold War-influenced western starring Glenn Ford and Edward G Robinson. A smallholder stands alone against the expansionist plans and brutal tactics of a tyrannical rancher.

programme.title: Arabesque
programme.desc: (1966) Gregory Peck stars in Stanley Donen's spy thiller. An Oxford professor is unwittingly drawn into a deadly web of political intrigue. With Sophia Loren and Alan Badel.

programme.title: Jumanji: The Next Level
programme.desc: (2019) Adventure comedy sequel with Dwayne Johnson, Jack Black, Kevin Hart and Karen Gillan. The old school pals enter the Jumanji video game again to save their friend.

programme.title: Kingsman: The Secret Service
programme.desc: (2014) Action-comedy with Colin Firth, Taron Egerton and Samuel L Jackson. A London teenager is introduced to a secret society of immaculately dressed agents that exists to save the world.

programme.title: Holy Cow
programme.desc: (2024) Tender coming-of-age drama about a teenager who suddenly becomes responsible for his young sister. Can he make some serious cheese by making... cheese? In French/subs.

programme.title: Antlers
programme.desc: (2021) Dark, brooding horror with Keri Russell. A teacher tries to help a troubled pupil. She's in for a shock. The boy's bringing home roadkill for something that's locked in his basement.

programme.title: The Legend of 5 Mile Cave
programme.desc: In 1929 a mysterious stranger renting a room on a widow's farm shares tales of the Old West with her young son. As they bond, the boy realizes the man knows a little too much about a gold robbery, and his secret may save the farm.

programme.title: The Cowboy Way
programme.desc: S02 E02 Put a Ring on It Bubba, Cody and Booger act fast to doctor their cows when a dangerous infection threatens the herd; Misty starts her cattle business; Bubba gets tough love from his in-laws; Booger professes his love to Jaclyn, asking for her hand in marriage.

programme.title: The Cowboy Way
programme.desc: S02 E03 Tradition vs. Technology The guys struggle to round up the herd, prompting Cody to try out GPS technology; Jaclyn finds the perfect wedding dress; Bubba goes on a crash diet to fit into his tuxedo; Cody writes a song for Booger's wedding and surprises Misty with a trailer.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: S01 E06 Eight Hours to Die Mark is kidnapped by a man who blames Lucas for his own son's death.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: S01 E07 Duel of Honor An Italian count arrives in North Fork and challenges the town bully to a duel.

programme.title: Borderline
programme.desc: A federal agent (Fred MacMurray) and a policewoman (Claire Trevor) track a Mexican drug ring, each unaware the other is undercover.

programme.title: War of the Wildcats
programme.desc: An oilman (Albert Dekker) and a cowboy (John Wayne) become boom-town rivals for a schoolmarm (Martha Scott) and Oklahoma oil.

programme.title: Maverick
programme.desc: S01 E16 Rage for Vengeance Bret robs a bank for a lofty motive and the love of a beautiful woman.

programme.title: Cheyenne
programme.desc: S02 E07 The Lone Gun Cheyenne is forced into a gunfight with the Laverson brothers, leaving one dead and one out for revenge.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: S02 E03 Badge Without Honor A Deputy U.S. Marshal arrives to escort a man to California to testify against a gang; guest Dan Duryea.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: S02 E06 Eddie's Daughter Lucas becomes involved in the family troubles of the hotel clerk.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: S02 E07 Panic Fallen ill, a couple seeks shelter with Lucas.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: S02 E08 Ordeal Lucas and Mark travel across the desert, returning from a trip to lay in a supply of salt.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: S02 E09 The Spiked Rifle Lucas agrees to ride shotgun on the North Fork stage.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: S02 E09 The Spiked Rifle Lucas agrees to ride shotgun on the North Fork stage.

programme.title: The Cowboy Way
programme.desc: S02 E04 Bulls on the Beach Cody suffers an injury on the job and must overcome several obstacles to pull off his annual rodeo event, Bulls on the Beach; Bubba heads to Mississippi to help out at his father in-law's company; Booger and Jaclyn continue wedding preparations.

programme.title: The Cowboy Way
programme.desc: S02 E05 Saddle Up or Settle Down? The cowboys remove a dangerous cow from a rancher's herd; Bubba continues to work for his father-in-law and is rewarded with a hefty payout; Misty convinces Cody to give her his ranch horse; wedding planning causes tension between Booger and Jaclyn.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: S01 E08 The Safe Guard A new bank in North Fork is in danger of being robbed.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: S01 E09 The Sister Mark tries to play Cupid for his father and a pretty young stranger who arrives in town.

programme.title: F Troop
programme.desc: S02 E26 Guns, Guns, Who's Got the Guns? O'Rourke, Agarn and Parmenter go under cover to nab a gunrunner who is trading with the Apaches.

programme.title: F Troop
programme.desc: S02 E27 Marriage, Fort Courage Style O'Rourke and Agarn bring a marriage broker (Mary Wickes) to the fort.

programme.title: Wild West Chronicles
programme.desc: S01 E15 Charles M. Russell: The Cowboy Artist Charlie Russell is an aimless cowhand who enjoys painting scenes of his life on the range until his new bride, Nancy, gives him the push he needs to stop cowboying in order to focus on the artwork that will soon make him famous.

programme.title: Wild West Chronicles
programme.desc: S02 E04 The Legend of Nat Love When Black cowboy Nat Love overnights in Deadwood during a cattle drive, he decides to enter a Fourth of July cowboy competition; confident in his roping, riding, and shooting skills, he is eager to test his mettle against the best cowboys around.

programme.title: Into the Wild Frontier
programme.desc: S02 E08 William Sublette: King of the Fur Trade In his quest to become king of the fur trade, William Sublette revolutionizes the industry and puts his life on the line in the process; he may risk too much when he rushes to save his comrades in the largest battle of the mountain man era.

programme.title: The Young Riders
programme.desc: S02 E11 The Play's the Thing Cody is asked to join a group of traveling actors, unknowingly taking part in a plot to assassinate a U.S. general.

programme.title: Maverick
programme.desc: S01 E17 Rope of Cards Bret uses a long-odds poker trick when he is the lone juror holding out for an acquittal in a murder trial.

programme.title: Cheyenne
programme.desc: S02 E08 The Trap The corrupt sheriff of Stagge City jails Cheyenne on charges of vagrancy.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: S02 E04 The Mill Ben tries to help his paraplegic neighbor Tom by setting up a grain mill on his unused land; Tom's hired hand raises his suspicion about Ben's plan.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: S02 E10 Letter to the Law Outlaws threaten to kill Micah unless their leader is freed.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: S02 E11 Legacy The town drunk's son thinks he is heir to Lucas' ranch.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: S02 E12 The Baby Sitter Lucas and Mark find themselves caring for a 6-month-old baby.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: S02 E13 The Coward Lucas becomes involved in a revenge fight when he befriends a young Easterner.

programme.title: Fight to Survive
programme.desc: Faith, determination and human spirit abound in "Fight to Survive," which recounts stories of people's deadly ordeals in the outdoors. Accompanying survivors back to where harrowing events occurred is rock-climber Craig DeMartino, who is featured in the premiere episode. His right leg was amputated below the knee after a climbing accident, but he continued in his sport. In 2006 he became the first amputee to free-climb the 3,200-foot face of Yosemite's El Capitan in one day. Other stories tell of sailor Steven Callahan clinging to a raft in the Atlantic, fisherman Dean Ririe trapped by a boulder in icy water, and hiker Ted Porter falling into a glacial crevasse.

As Chance falls for Greg's daughter, Tish (Katharine Ross), he must battle both the flames in the field and the ones in his heart.

programme.title: Gunsmoke in Tucson
programme.desc: An outlaw leader (Mark Stevens) and his lawman brother (Forrest Tucker) straddle a feud between farmers and cattlemen.

programme.title: Escape From Fort Bravo
programme.desc: A Southern belle (Eleanor Parker) frees a Rebel officer (John Forsythe) and his men from a Union captain's (William Holden) Arizona fort.

programme.title: A Face in the Crowd
programme.desc: A TV woman (Patricia Neal) turns Arkansas bum Lonesome Rhodes (Andy Griffith) into a homespun media hero rotten with power.

programme.title: Strange Affair
programme.desc: Eminent psychiatrist Dr. Brenner (Erwin Kalser) invites cartoonist Bill Harrison (Allyn Joslyn) and his wife, Jack (Evelyn Keyes), to a banquet honoring war refugees. Bill volunteers to pick up fellow psychiatrist Dr. Baumler at the train station, but the man vanishes when he has Bill stop so he can use a pay phone. At the dinner, Bill and Jack are seated with Brenner's daughter, Freda (Nina Foch), and, to Bill's surprise, another man is introduced as Baumler -- who dies moments later.

programme.title: Decision at Sundown
programme.desc: Hell-bent on revenge, flinty gunslinger Bart Allison (Randolph Scott) rides into a sleepy Western town with one goal in mind: to kill local roughneck Tate Kimbrough (John Carroll), who kidnapped his wife years ago. Both men have blood on their hands over the woman's eventual suicide. Allison and Kimbrough, wracked with guilt but boiling over with bloodlust, are set to face off for one final confrontation. Tensions mount as sunset approaches, and the townspeople must choose sides.

programme.title: Sundown Saunders
programme.desc: While gambling, Sundown Saunders (Bob Steele) wins the deed to a fertile tract of land and decides to settle down as a rancher. Along the way, he meets Bess Preston (Catherine Cotter), a sheepherder's daughter who, it turns out, was sold rights to the same piece of land. Arriving in town, Sundown tries to get to the bottom of the phony deeds, but crosses Sheriff Baker (Earl Dwire) and winds up a wanted man. He will have to break up the local crime ring if he is to clear his name.

programme.title: The Adventures of Sherlock Holmes
programme.desc: A battered hat and a Christmas goose are Holmes' only clues to clearing a falsely accused man.

programme.title: Paid Programming
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: The Cisco Kid in Old New Mexico
programme.desc: The Cisco Kid (Duncan Renaldo) and Pancho (Martin Garralaga) free a girl (Gwen Kenyon) accused of murder, then find the killer.

programme.title: Through the Bible With Les Feldick
programme.desc: Les Feldick, an Oklahoma farmer and rancher with a special gift for teaching the Bible; his simple and nondenominational approach on the program "Through the Bible with Les Feldick" has reached millions around the world with the Gospel of Grace.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp
programme.desc: When Earp takes over as marshal of Wichita, his first challenge is a local group of vigilantes focused on lynching a local card dealer, despite evidence that the man acted in self-defense.

programme.title: Paid Programming: Carshield -- Cars Have Changed
A Face in the Crowd
programme.desc: Ambitious young radio producer Marcia Jeffries (Patricia Neal) finds a charming rogue named Larry "Lonesome" Rhodes (Andy Griffith) in an Arkansas drunk tank and puts him on the air. Soon, Rhodes' local popularity gets him an appearance on television in Memphis, which he parlays into national network stardom that he uses to endorse a presidential candidate for personal gain. But the increasingly petulant star's ego, arrogance and womanizing threaten his rise to the top.

programme.title: Strange Affair
programme.desc: Eminent psychiatrist Dr. Brenner (Erwin Kalser) invites cartoonist Bill Harrison (Allyn Joslyn) and his wife, Jack (Evelyn Keyes), to a banquet honoring war refugees. Bill volunteers to pick up fellow psychiatrist Dr. Baumler at the train station, but the man vanishes when he has Bill stop so he can use a pay phone. At the dinner, Bill and Jack are seated with Brenner's daughter, Freda (Nina Foch), and, to Bill's surprise, another man is introduced as Baumler -- who dies moments later.

programme.title: The Kid From Broken Gun
programme.desc: After years on the East Coast, former boxer Jack Mahoney (Jack Mahoney) returns to New Mexico and finds himself framed for murder. Though the only evidence is circumstantial, in the face of vicious prosecutor Kiefer (Myron Healey), Mahoney's girlfriend -- defense lawyer Gail Kingston (Angela Stevens) -- fails to convince the jury of his innocence. Determined to clear Mahoney's name, postal worker Steve Reynolds (Charles Starrett) transforms himself into the masked rider known as the Durango Kid.

programme.title: The Man Behind the Gun
programme.desc: An Army major goes undercover to stop a dangerous plot to make Southern California a separate state, facing immense personal risk and complex challenges.

programme.title: Escape From Fort Bravo
programme.desc: Captain Roper (William Holden) is the warden of a Union-run prison camp. A mysterious woman named Carla Forester (Eleanor Parker) arrives at the camp in order to free the Confederate prisoners, and things get complicated when Carla and the captain begin to fall for each other. In an effort to recapture the escaped prisoners, Roper has a run-in with a group of Mescalero Indians. In order to survive, he has to team up with his own prisoners to fight the Indians and wipe them out.

programme.title: Quantez
programme.desc: Chased to a ghost town by a posse, an outlaw (Fred MacMurray) and his gang end up surrounded by Apaches.

programme.title: Designing Woman
programme.desc: Sports reporter Mike (Gregory Peck) and clothes designer Marilla (Lauren Bacall) meet and fall in love while on vacation. They marry on a whim, only to come to the shocking realization that they have very little in common. Mike is a blue-collar sports fanatic. Marilla is a high-society fashion diva. But when Mike writes a tell-all piece about a boxing promoter (Edward Platt) with mob ties, they have to overcome their differences to save both their relationship and Mike's life.

programme.title: King of Kings
programme.desc: In this reenactment of the life of Jesus Christ, when word spreads throughout Judea that the son of God is to be born in Bethlehem, King Herod demands that all infants be killed. Mary (Siobhan McKenna) steals away with her young son, Jesus, who grows up preaching, performing miracles and acquiring devotees. One of Jesus' (Jeffrey Hunter) followers, Judas (Rip Torn), betrays him, and he is sentenced to crucifixion. But Jesus has always known of his fate and has prepared himself for death.

programme.title: The Man Behind the Gun
programme.desc: An Army major goes undercover to stop a dangerous plot to make Southern California a separate state, facing immense personal risk and complex challenges.

programme.title: The Adventures of Sherlock Holmes
programme.desc: A young woman is offered a lucrative post as governess to a small boy, provided she complies with several unusual requests made by her new employer.

programme.title: South of Monterey
programme.desc: The Cisco Kid (Gilbert Roland), Pancho (Martin Garralaga) and a dancer try to outfox a swindler.

programme.title: Through the Bible With Les Feldick
programme.desc: Les Feldick, an Oklahoma farmer and rancher with a special gift for teaching the Bible; his simple and nondenominational approach on the program "Through the Bible with Les Feldick" has reached millions around the world with the Gospel of Grace.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp
programme.desc: A man bent on revenge pays a gunman $1,000 to kill Wyatt Earp -- a gunman who claims to have faced Earp before.

programme.title: Paid Programming
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Designing Woman
programme.desc: Sports reporter Mike (Gregory Peck) and clothes designer Marilla (Lauren Bacall) meet and fall in love while on vacation. They marry on a whim, only to come to the shocking realization that they have very little in common. Mike is a blue-collar sports fanatic. Marilla is a high-society fashion diva. But when Mike writes a tell-all piece about a boxing promoter (Edward Platt) with mob ties, they have to overcome their differences to save both their relationship and Mike's life.

programme.title: King of Kings
programme.desc: In this reenactment of the life of Jesus Christ, when word spreads throughout Judea that the son of God is to be born in Bethlehem, King Herod demands that all infants be killed. Mary (Siobhan McKenna) steals away with her young son, Jesus, who grows up preaching, performing miracles and acquiring devotees. One of Jesus' (Jeffrey Hunter) followers, Judas (Rip Torn), betrays him, and he is sentenced to crucifixion. But Jesus has always known of his fate and has prepared himself for death.

programme.title: Smoke Signal
programme.desc: An Army deserter (Dana Andrews) and his girlfriend (Piper Laurie) shoot Grand Canyon rapids with his cavalry captors, chased by Indians.

programme.title: Quantez
programme.desc: Chased to a ghost town by a posse, an outlaw (Fred MacMurray) and his gang end up surrounded by Apaches.

programme.title: Ten Wanted Men
programme.desc: Rancher John Stewart (Randolph Scott) prefers to resolve problems without falling back on violent solutions. However, fellow cattleman Wick Campbell (Richard Boone) isn't so peaceful, and he hires a team of armed mercenaries, led by ruthless Frank Scavo (Leo Gordon), to rid him of any possible competition. After narrowly surviving an attack from Scavo and his men, Stewart has little choice but to fight back in order to save both his ranch and his family, including nephew Howie (Skip Homeier).

programme.title: The Victim
programme.desc: A rich woman (Elizabeth Montgomery) goes to her sister's house during a storm and is trapped inside with a killer.

programme.title: Buchanan Rides Alone
programme.desc: A Texan (Randolph Scott) pits a powerful family against itself to save a Mexican (Manuel Rojas) from hanging.

programme.title: Foreign Correspondent
programme.desc: A political assassination plunges an American reporter into international intrigue in pre-World War II Europe.

programme.title: Sabotage
programme.desc: A London housewife (Sylvia Sidney) learns that her husband (Oscar Homolka) is helping a secret group planting bombs in public places.

programme.title: The Adventures of Sherlock Holmes
programme.desc: Holmes and his brother investigate why an abducted man was forced to interpret for a Greek man swathed in bandages.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp
programme.desc: Earp is blamed when the saloon owner 's crooked games are exposed and the man is shot in the back.

programme.title: Beauty and the Bandit
programme.desc: The Cisco Kid (Gilbert Roland) and Chico (Martin Garralaga) secure the deed to a woman's ranch.

programme.title: Through the Bible With Les Feldick
programme.desc: Les Feldick, an Oklahoma farmer and rancher with a special gift for teaching the Bible; his simple and nondenominational approach on the program "Through the Bible with Les Feldick" has reached millions around the world with the Gospel of Grace.

programme.title: 1776 - 2026 250th Anniversary Quarter Celebration Program
programme.desc: 2026 will be one of the most historic years ever in U.S. coinage; join your host Mike Mezack to learn about the incredible U.S. Quarter program and get a chance at an exclusive P&D Roll!

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp
programme.desc: Dave Bennett, angry when Earp kicks him out of Wichita after a crooked card game, hires a killer to take out the marshal and make the town suffer.

programme.title: Foreign Correspondent
programme.desc: A political assassination plunges an American reporter into international intrigue in pre-World War II Europe.

programme.title: Sabotage
programme.desc: A London housewife (Sylvia Sidney) learns that her husband (Oscar Homolka) is helping a secret group planting bombs in public places.

programme.title: The Quick and the Dead
programme.desc: A mysterious stranger (Sam Elliott) befriends and protects a settler (Tom Conti) and his wife (Kate Capshaw) in 1876 Wyoming.

programme.title: Blazing the Western Trail
programme.desc: A stagecoach operator calls on the Durango Kid when an evil rival attempts to drive him out of business.

programme.title: Laramie Mountains
programme.desc: The Durango Kid learns that crooked scouts are behind attempts to escalate a war between a local tribe and the cavalry.

programme.title: Major Dundee
programme.desc: A Union major (Charlton Heston) chases Indians to Mexico with a condemned Confederate captain (Richard Harris) and a cavalry of prisoners.

programme.title: The Fighting Seabees
programme.desc: A construction boss (John Wayne) and a Navy commander (Dennis O'Keefe) fight over a newswoman (Susan Hayward) and against the Japanese.

programme.title: Hellcats of the Navy
programme.desc: A submarine commander (Ronald Reagan) enters the Sea of Japan with a frogman who had flirted with his girlfriend (Nancy Davis).

programme.title: Masterson of Kansas
programme.desc: Bat Masterson (George Montgomery), Doc Holliday (James Griffith) and Wyatt Earp rescue a framed rancher and stop an Indian war.

programme.title: Count of Monte Cristo
programme.desc: A framed French sailor (Richard Chamberlain) manages to escape from a prison, finds treasure and re-enters society to seek revenge.
